report_md:
# Spam Risk Reviewer Report

- Package: spam-risk-reviewer@0.1.0
- Verdict: hold
- Preflight clear: false
- Escalation: needs_human
- Authentication checked: SPF=true, DKIM=false, DMARC=true
- List hygiene checked: bounce_rate=0.085, complaint_rate=0.006, freshness=190
- Policy thresholds: bounce<=0.02, complaint<=0.001, freshness<=90, warm_up>=14
- Blockers: DKIM did not pass; bounce_rate 0.085 exceeds 0.02; complaint_rate 0.006 exceeds 0.001; list freshness 190 days exceeds 90; warm_up_days 3 below 14; content risk flag: urgency language; content risk flag: short-deadline promotion
- Effect boundary: public_send remains owned by governed send-as.
- Harness cases: low-risk-verified-sender and high-risk-incomplete-auth-poor-list.
